codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses the prior blocking failures: relay host binding now defaults to 0.0.0.0 with MORS_RELAY_HOST override support, and relay entrypoint now bootstraps persistence dependencies before server startup with fail-fast handling when bootstrap is not ready.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker marked skill procedure as fully followed, but did not include the manual runtime check expected by both the feature verification steps and skill guidance for user-facing relay changes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification for worker session 153e0bec-c2f9-4786-ae8e-b17e255da5f3 lists only automated commands (vitest/typecheck/lint/test) and no manual relay start + curl health check; transcript skeleton likewise shows no manual relay command execution.

summary: Reviewed the fix transcript skeleton and both diffs (original failure commit e18169d and fix commit d990184). The two prior blocking issues are resolved in code and tests, so this fix adequately addresses the original failure.
